  security: Identity, access control, encryption, networking, compliance, and governance

  configuration: 'Configuring Azure Databricks: account/workspace settings, security,

  decision-making: Guides for choosing architectures, SKUs, runtimes, and tools, plus

    formats) and optimizing Databricks cost/perf.
  limits-quotas: Limits, quotas, and constraints for Azure Databricks compute, SQL,
    model serving, AI/BI, Lakeflow connectors/pipelines, Lakebase, tokens, and streaming,
    plus related configuration and scaling guidance
  best-practices: Best practices for Databricks architecture, performance, cost, governance,
    streaming, AI/ML/RAG, Model Serving, Lakeflow, and SQL—covering tuning, reliability,
    security, and production operations.
  deployment: 'Deploying and operating Azure Databricks: workspace setup, CI/CD, apps

    DR, and regional/release details.'
  architecture-patterns: Design patterns and reference architectures for Databricks
    lakehouse, including data/AI pipelines, RAG, MLOps, governance, networking, HA/DR,
    security, and cost/performance optimization.
  integrations: Patterns and APIs for integrating Databricks with apps, agents, BI
    tools, databases, streams, Lakehouse Federation, Lakeflow, ML/GenAI, and external
    systems using SDKs, SQL, REST, and connectors.
  troubleshooting: Diagnosing and fixing Databricks errors and failures across compute,
    SQL, Spark, streaming, Lakeflow, connectors, VS Code/CLI, model serving, and Unity
    Catalog, with logs and debugging tools.
skill_description: Expert knowledge for Azure Databricks development including troubleshooting,
  best practices, decision making, architecture & design patterns, limits & quotas,
  security, configuration, integrations & coding patterns, and deployment. Use when
  using Unity Catalog, Lakeflow/Lakebase, SQL warehouses, Model Serving, or Lakehouse
  Federation, and other Azure Databricks related development tasks. Not for Azure
  Synapse Analytics (use azure-synapse-analytics), Azure HDInsight (use azure-hdinsight),
  Azure Machine Learning (use azure-machine-learning), Azure Data Factory (use azure-data-factory).
use_when: Use when using Unity Catalog, Lakeflow/Lakebase, SQL warehouses, Model Serving,
  or Lakehouse Federation, and other Azure Databricks related development tasks.
confusable_not_for: Not for Azure Synapse Analytics (use azure-synapse-analytics),
